name: 120"x60" Table Cloth Blue Floral - Threshold™
description:
Keep your dining table classically elegant with this Floral Tablecloth from Threshold™. This rectangular tablecloth is adorned with a floral print on a blue background to create a lovely foundation for your tableware and decorative pieces. Made from 100% cotton poplin fabric, this rectangular tablecloth helps keep your dining table protected from spills, and it's machine washable for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
